title: Zenflow Workflow
description: Schema for zenflow multi-agent workflow orchestration documents. Supports YAML and JSON serialization.

description.description: Human-readable description of the workflow's purpose.

version.description: Schema version. Currently only 1 is defined.

agents.description: Named agent definitions. Keys are agent names referenced by steps.

steps.description: Ordered list of workflow steps forming a DAG.

Duration.description: Duration string in Go format. Supports hours (h), minutes (m), seconds (s). Examples: "30m", "1h30m", "45s". No fractions, no ms/us/ns.

description.description: Required. Human-readable description of the agent's role.

prompt.description: System prompt for the agent. Use @ prefix to reference a file (e.g., "@prompts/coder.md").

model.description: LLM model identifier. Free-form string. Bare ("claude-sonnet-4-6") and provider-prefixed ("bedrock/anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6", "google/gemini-3-pro-preview", "azure/gpt-5", "vertex/...") are valid. The CLI's auto-router does not accept the bare "anthropic/" prefix.

tools.description: Tool allowlist. List explicit tool names; wildcards are NOT supported. Omit the field to allow every tool registered with the orchestrator.

maxTurns.description: Maximum LLM conversation turns. Defaults to 50 when omitted (orchestrator default). Setting `0` is equivalent to omitting the field (the default of 50 is used). Negative values are rejected.

resultSchema.description: JSON Schema defining the shape of the agent's structured result. Compiled into a submit_result tool at runtime; agent calls this tool to produce structured output.

id.description: Unique step identifier. Must start with a letter, followed by alphanumeric, underscore, or hyphen.

agent.description: Reference to an agent defined in the agents section.

instructions.description: Task instructions for the agent. Use @ prefix to reference a file (e.g., "@instructions/design.md").

dependsOn.description: Step IDs that must complete before this step runs.

contextFiles.description: File paths whose contents are injected into agent context. Relative to workflow file directory.

model.description: Override model for this step. Takes precedence over agent model.

timeout.description: Timeout for this step (or entire loop block if step has a loop).

retries.description: Number of retry attempts on failure.

maxRetries.description: Maximum tool-call retries inside a single step (passed to the agent runner via WithMaxRetries). Distinct from 'retries' which retries the whole step. 0 = use the orchestrator default.

condition.description: CEL expression. Step is skipped if expression evaluates to false. Evaluated before the step runs.

include.description: Reference to a named include or a file path to a sub-workflow. Mutually exclusive with agent, instructions, loop, condition, contextFiles, model (enforced by validation, not schema).

maxIterations.description: Hard cap on iterations. Required for repeat-until loops. Not applicable to forEach.

until.description: CEL expression evaluated after each iteration. Loop stops when true.

untilAgent.description: Agent name that acts as judge. Executor reads result.done from agent output. Loop stops when result.done=true. Content is free-form text; decision is in result (structured JSON object).

oneOf.description: Static array literal. Items can be string, object, or any JSON type.

forEach.description: Array to iterate over. CEL expression string or static array literal. Mutually exclusive with until/untilAgent/maxIterations/delay.

maxConcurrency.description: Maximum parallel forEach iterations. Default: all parallel. Setting `0` is equivalent to omitting the field (treated as unset).

delay.description: Wait between iterations. Repeat-until only; not applicable to forEach.

steps.description: Inner steps for multi-step loop. If absent, loop the parent step. Inner steps MUST NOT have loop (no nested loops; enforced by validation, not schema).

outputMode.description:
How a multi-iteration loop builds its final Content. 'last' (default) keeps only the final iteration's output. 'cumulative' concatenates all iterations' outputs separated by '

---

'. Empty string is equivalent to 'last' for backward compatibility.

Includes.description: Named sub-workflow registry. Keys are names referenced by step include fields. Values are file paths relative to workflow file.

maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of steps executing in parallel. Default: 5. Setting `0` is equivalent to omitting the field (default of 5 is used).

onStepFailure.description: Failure strategy. Default: cascade. cascade: fail dependents. skip-dependents: skip dependents, continue others. abort: stop all.

stepTimeout.description: Default timeout for each step (unless overridden by step-level timeout).

isolation.description: Isolation strategy. Free-form string; consumer-defined. Examples: "none", "worktree-per-step".

scheduler.description: Scheduling algorithm for parallel step execution. Default: dependency-first.

maxRetries.description: Workflow-level default for the agent-runner per-step tool-call retry cap. Falls through to per-step 'maxRetries' when set; otherwise the orchestrator default applies.
